title: passiflora cubensis subsp. cubensis
intro: Passiflora cubensis subsp. cubensis, also known as Yellow Granadilla, is a species of passionflower native to Cuba. This plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties, such as sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Passiflora cubensis subsp. cubensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
